title: Tips to Calm an Overtired Toddler Before Bedtime
description: Struggling to calm your overtired toddler before sleep? Consider creating a peaceful atmosphere by dimming the lights and reading a soft bedtime story. Another wonderful way to soothe your child is by recording a bedtime story in your own voice with NinniTales, allowing them to hear your comforting tone. Establishing a consistent bedtime routine and incorporating gentle music can also help ease them into a restful night. Try these ideas for a smoother transition to sleep! #ToddlerSleep #BedtimeRoutine #CalmBeforeBed
